ground_truth.description: Photo of famous Merlion statue/fountain in Singapore. Tall buildings in background including one with Maybank logo.
ground_truth.photographer_description: This is a photo of the famous Merlion statue/fountain in Singapore. In the background you can see tall buildings, one with the Maybank logo on it. A colonial-style building with red-tiled roof is barely visible in the background. I expect it to get all of this, as it is a famous landmark. Daytime, clear skies.

details.description: Daytime waterfront view at Marina Bay featuring the iconic white Merlion statue spouting a strong jet of water into the bay. The sculpture (lion’s head, fish’s body) stands on a stone plinth at the edge of tiered granite steps and a promenade lined with trees. Behind it sits the grand, white, red‑roofed Fullerton Hotel (a neoclassical heritage building). Further back rises Singapore’s CBD skyline with glass-and-steel office towers; the blue-striped Maybank Tower is especially prominent, with other tall towers clustered around it. The sky is bright with scattered altocumulus clouds; water in the foreground ripples from the fountain’s splash.

entities.notes: Icon of Singapore with lion head and fish body; symbol created for the Singapore Tourism Board in 1964 by Fraser Brunner.

entities.name: Merlion statue (main), Merlion Park
entities.notes: Sculpted by Lim Nang Seng, unveiled 1972; approx. 8.6 m tall; relocated to current Merlion Park site in 2002; cement-fondue over structure; continuously spouts water into Marina Bay.

details.description: A white Merlion statue stands on a circular stone pedestal with a blue-tiled base in the foreground, spouting water into a rectangular pool. The statue is surrounded by a stepped, open waterfront promenade with greenery. Behind it, a dense cluster of modern skyscrapers forms the Marina Bay skyline, including a tall blue-striped Maybank building and the white colonial-style Fullerton Hotel Singapore with a red-tiled roof section. The sky is bright with scattered clouds, suggesting daytime, and the overall scene is a well-known waterfront landmark area of Singapore near Merlion Park.

details.description: A daytime, eye-level photograph capturing the iconic Merlion statue in Singapore. The white statue, featuring a lion's head and a fish's body, stands on a tiered grey stone pedestal and spouts a powerful jet of water into the foreground basin (Marina Bay). The water surface is rippled with the impact of the spray. Behind the statue, the historic Fullerton Hotel is prominently displayed, showcasing its Neoclassical architecture with colonnades and a red-tiled roof; the text 'FULLERTON HOTEL' is visible on its facade. Rising behind the hotel is a dense cluster of modern skyscrapers forming the Central Business District skyline. Identifiable buildings include the Maybank Tower with its yellow logo, the UOB Plaza with its geometric facade, the MYP Centre, and a high-rise displaying 'CapitaLand' and 'wework' signage (21 Collyer Quay). To the left, the glass facade of the One Fullerton complex is partially visible. Lush green trees frame the mid-ground, and the sky above is bright blue with scattered textured clouds.

details.description: The image features the iconic Merlion statue, a mythical creature with a lion's head and the body of a fish, spouting a stream of water into Marina Bay. The statue is white with detailed scales and sits on a blue-tiled base. In the background, the neoclassical architecture of The Fullerton Hotel is visible, characterized by its white facade and red-tiled roof. Further back, the modern skyline of Singapore's Central Business District rises, including the blue-glass Maybank Tower and the tall, grey, textured UOB Plaza One. The foreground shows stone steps leading down to the water, and the sky is bright with scattered clouds.

details.description: Daytime waterfront view of the iconic Merlion fountain in Singapore. The white statue with a lion’s head and fish body spouts a long arc of water into the bay from a stone plinth beside broad steps and a tree-lined promenade. Behind it rises the Singapore CBD skyline, including the blue-banded Maybank Tower, the sharp-topped One Raffles Place, and other office towers. The neoclassical Fullerton Hotel with red-tiled roof sits just behind the statue. Sky is bright with scattered clouds; water in the foreground is calm.

details.description: A waterfront scene at Merlion Park in Singapore featuring the Merlion statue in the foreground. The white stone statue sits on a circular pedestal in a shallow pool with water spurting from its mouth. Surrounding steps lead down to the water, and leafy trees line the promenade. In the background, a cluster of tall modern skyscrapers forms the Marina Bay skyline, including a prominent blue-and-gold Maybank-branded tower. The sky is bright blue with light clouds and pedestrians stroll along the promenade.

entities.name: Merlion statue
entities.notes: Iconic half-lion, half-fish sculpture at Merlion Park; water spurts from its mouth. Sculpture by Lim Nang Seng, installed in 1972; approximately 8.6 m tall; symbol of Singapore.

details.description: The image shows the iconic Merlion statue spouting water into Marina Bay, set on a stepped waterfront plaza with trees and seating. Behind it rises Singapore’s downtown skyline, including the blue‑striped Maybank Tower and other Raffles Place CBD skyscrapers. To the right, the white neoclassical Fullerton Hotel with a red‑tiled roof is visible. Lighting is bright daylight with a partly cloudy sky. The scene is urban, waterfront, and strongly associated with Singapore’s Merlion Park at the mouth of the Singapore River.

details.description: A daytime view of Merlion Park in Singapore featuring the iconic Merlion statue, a white sculpture with a lion head and a fish-like body, spouting water from its mouth into a pool. The statue sits on a mosaic pedestal with blue-toned tiling and is surrounded by broad stone steps forming a sunken square. In the background, the Marina Bay skyline dominates the horizon with several tall glass-and-steel office towers, including a prominent blue-striped skyscraper bearing a Maybank sign, and the white colonial-era Fullerton Hotel Singapore facade. Trees line the promenade, and the sky is bright blue with scattered clouds, contributing a mix of historical and modern urban elements.

details.description: A daytime photograph capturing the iconic Merlion statue in Singapore, seen in profile spouting a jet of water into Marina Bay. The white statue, featuring a lion's head and a fish's body, stands on a pedestal adorned with blue wave-like tiles. In the background, the dense skyline of Singapore's Central Business District (Raffles Place) rises prominently against a blue sky with scattered clouds. Notable skyscrapers include the Maybank Tower with its distinctive yellow logo, the twin towers of UOB Plaza, and the building at 21 Collyer Quay displaying 'CapitaLand' and 'WeWork' signage. Nestled at the base of the skyscrapers is the historic, colonial-style Fullerton Hotel with its red roof. Steps lead down to the water's edge in the foreground.

details.description: A vertical shot of the iconic Merlion statue in Singapore, a mythical creature with a lion's head and a fish's body, spouting a stream of water into Marina Bay. The statue stands on a circular stone pedestal at the edge of Merlion Park, which features tiered concrete steps for visitors. In the background, the dense skyline of the Central Business District is visible under a bright, partly cloudy sky. Notable buildings include the Maybank Tower with its blue and silver horizontal bands, the neoclassical Fullerton Hotel with its red roof, and several other modern glass and steel skyscrapers like UOB Plaza and One Raffles Place.

details.description: Daytime waterfront scene in Singapore showing the iconic Merlion statue spouting water into Marina Bay. The white sculpture with a lion head and fish body stands on a stone plinth with mosaic waves, fronting stepped terraces and greenery. Behind it rises the Singapore CBD skyline, including the blue-striped Maybank Tower and the neoclassical Fullerton Hotel with a red-tiled roof and colonnaded facade. The sky is bright with scattered clouds and the water in the bay is calm.

details.description: A white Merlion statue stands on a stone pedestal in a circular pool, spurting water from its mouth into the surrounding basin. The statue is set on a raised platform with blue-tiled steps and a stepped plaza around the pool. In the background, Singapore's skyline rises with modern glass towers and a white colonial-style hotel bearing a golden sign. A tall blue-striped skyscraper with a Maybank sign is visible among the high-rises.
